title: Craftable Spawners
description: This datapack adds recipe to craft spawners
body: ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aabbabfc98e6a03150d004b88845e81ca7d3b5d6.png) # This Datapack adds **Spawner** **Recipe** This feature is making **automatic** farm easier to create! To craft **Spawner** you need: - **4** Iron Block - **2** Chains - **2** Iron Nuggets - **1** Egg Recipe: ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c089c4ba6d3e6b226bb81ab44ec5c7b4b86178ed_0.webp) Thanks for reading. I hope you download the datapack!. Please Report any bugs. Its simple datapack. I hope you like it! **Thanks** ## **Support Me!** https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw
